overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red coat exploring a dark, rocky coastal canyon at night. The character walks steadily from a narrow ravine lined with giant bones through to a wider shore area scattered with wooden wreckage and tidal pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with giant rib bones

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon, passing large curved bones protruding from the left wall

entered.detail: large curved white bones resembling ribs embedded in the canyon wall
dark jagged rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
steep rock wall on the right side of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark canyon passage flanked by steep rock walls. Large curved bones protrude from the left wall, creating an ominous atmosphere. The path ahead shows a faint light where the canyon opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon ravine with layered rock formations

events.description: exits narrow bone-lined canyon into wider ravine with open sky and star visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon opens up, approaching large tilted rock formations in the distance

entered.detail: massive tilted rock formation with flat top rising ahead in the canyon
layered sedimentary rocks sloping upward on the right side
angular rock strata tilted at steep angles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character exits the narrow canyon into a wider ravine. The starry night sky becomes fully visible above. Large dramatic rock formations dominate the view ahead, with tilted sedimentary layers visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal debris field with wooden shipwreck remains

events.description: encounters scattered wooden wreckage and debris from a shipwreck on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden crates and ship debris scattered along the rocky shore, navigating around obstacles

entered.detail: broken wooden hull remains and scattered planks from a wrecked vessel
stacked wooden cargo boxes and barrels among the debris
wooden barrels with white canvas wrapping scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an area littered with wooden shipwreck debris. Broken crates, barrels, and planks are scattered on the right side of the path. The ground shows patches of seaweed and the large rock formation shifts to the left as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky shore with tidal pools

events.description: ground becomes wet with reflective tidal pools and shallow water

agents.ego_description: approaching distant rock formations while walking through shallow reflective water pools

entered.detail: shallow reflective pools of water covering the sandy ground
natural rock arch formation visible in the distance ahead
scattered white bleached logs and branches on the shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow tidal pools that reflect the night sky. The wooden debris is left behind as the terrain opens into a wider sandy shore. A distinctive rock arch is visible in the far distance ahead, with scattered driftwood along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, bone-lined canyon into a vast, starry coastal expanse. It begins within a narrow, dark passage flanked by steep rock walls and ominous protruding bones, moving steadily toward a faint light ahead. As the character exits the canyon, the scene opens into a wider ravine where the oppressive walls give way to a view of the starry night sky and dramatic, tilted sedimentary rock formations. The path then shifts through an area littered with wooden shipwreck debris, broken crates, and seaweed before the terrain expands further into a sandy shore. Finally, the camera glides through shallow tidal pools reflecting the stars, leaving the wreckage behind as it heads toward a distant rock arch and scattered driftwood.
